profile_backed_target.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- --quiet

focused_baseline.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_dot_i64/paired_vectors --quiet

candidate_rebench.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_dot_i64/paired_vectors --quiet

one_lever: Specialize exact DType::I64 rank-2 paired-vector dot into a direct row-major wrapping accumulator before the generic numeric dot classifier.

isomorphism.ordering: Rows are emitted in ascending batch index order; each row accumulates kk from 0 to width-1, matching the previous paired-vector loop order.
isomorphism.tie_breaking: Not applicable: dot has no ties, sorting, comparisons, or conflict resolution.
isomorphism.floating_point: Identical by exclusion: the direct path accepts only DType::I64 rank-2 tensors; all real and complex dot cases fall back unchanged.
isomorphism.integer_overflow: Uses wrapping_mul followed by wrapping_add, matching fj-lax signed integer dot semantics and removing the debug-overflow mismatch in the old dispatch helper.
isomorphism.rng: Unchanged: no RNG primitive, seed, or state is read or written.
isomorphism.fallback: Non-tensor, non-I64, non-rank2, unequal-shape, unexpected-length, or non-I64-literal cases return None and use the existing generic path.

validation.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-dispatch dot_paired -- --nocapture
validation.result: passed 7 focused paired-dot tests including I64 wrapping parity
passed 246 unit tests, 55 integration tests, and doctests

validation.command: rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-dispatch --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings

validation.result: exit 0; critical issues 0; warning inventory remains file scope

notes: Higher post-reprofile linalg rows were not claimed because frankenjax-p1vbf is already in progress.
